data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: All updates made. check-onboarding.sh: updated /dso:design-onboarding → /dso:onboarding and /dso:dev-onboarding → /dso:architect-foundation in 4 locations (header comments, JSON skill keys, text output). validate-review-output.sh: added architect-foundation as valid caller alongside dev-onboarding in 7 locations (header comment, hash var, usage(), --list-callers, caller validation case, CALLER_SCHEMA dict, CALLER_HASH case). .test-index: no stale entries found (already clean). dso-setup.sh: no skill name references to update.
